Module com.code
Package com.models

Class Vehicle

java.lang.Object
com.models.Vehicle
All Implemented Interfaces:
Animateable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Car, Truck
public abstract class Vehicle extends Object implements Animateable
The Vehicle class represents a vehicle with various attributes such as color, id, speed, and lane. This class implements the Animateable interface and provides methods to manipulate and retrieve vehicle properties.

It also keeps track of unique identifiers for each vehicle using an AtomicInteger.

    Constructor
    Description
    Vehicle(int lane, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, int speedBefore, int speed)
    Constructs a new Vehicle with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.

  • Constructor Details

    • Vehicle

      public Vehicle(int lane, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, int speedBefore, int speed)
      Constructs a new Vehicle with the specified lane, color, speed before, and current speed.
      Parameters:
      lane - the lane in which the vehicle is driving
      color - the color of the vehicle
      speedBefore - the speed of the vehicle before the current speed
      speed - the current speed of the vehicle

      public void setColor(javafx.scene.paint.Color color)
      Sets the color of the vehicle.
      Parameters:
      color - the new color of the vehicle

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the unique identifier of the vehicle. This method is generally not used since IDs are auto-incremented.
      Parameters:
      id - the new id of the vehicle

    • setSpeedBefore

      public void setSpeedBefore(int speedBefore)
      Sets the speed of the vehicle before the current speed.
      Parameters:
      speedBefore - the new speed before the current speed

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(int speed)
      Sets the current speed of the vehicle.
      Parameters:
      speed - the new current speed

    • setLane

      public void setLane(int lane)
      Sets the lane in which the vehicle is driving.
      Parameters:
      lane - the new lane of the vehicle

    • setWidth

      public void setWidth(int width)
      Sets the width of the vehicle.
      Parameters:
      width - the new width of the vehicle

    • setHeight

      public void setHeight(int height)
      Sets the height of the vehicle.
      Parameters:
      height - the new height of the vehicle

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the vehicle, including its lane, speed before, and current speed.

      toString in class Object
